title: dryopteris × deweveri
intro: Dryopteris × deweveri, a sterile hybrid of the Dryopteris genus, is a type of fern plant that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dryopteris × deweveri include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Dryopteris × deweveri can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and reduce symptoms of various ailments.
